_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: Treatment with 2 μg/mL dox induced physiologic levels of WT and mutant EGFP–K-Ras protein expression in a high percentage of MOLM-13 KRAS KO cells
